---
name: "Help Wanted: LangChain Adapter"
about: Build a ClawSight adapter for LangChain agents
labels: [help wanted]
---

## Task
Create a simple LangChain callback that streams events to ClawSight (logs + cost metrics).

## Why
LangChain devs can monitor chains immediately using `clawsight` SDK.

## Notes
- SDK entry point: `agentwatch-app/sdk/package/index.js`
- Example agent: `stress-test.js`

Comment below if you want to take it!
